en: Happy face. And that's a clam? As happy as a clam.
Yes! As happy as a clam. What a gay guess, idiot.
Pierce, you're up. Eat my dust, winger.
You do know we're on the same team. Go!

I think they'll both drop charges, but we gotta take statements. It's gonna be a while.
ko: 둘 다 고소는 취하할 것 같아,
